title: Salty Chicken Five Spice Stir-Fry
description: A kid-friendly and tender Indian-style stir-fry featuring salty chicken, Chinese five spice powder, and a touch of tang from pickles, suitable for all diets.

ingredients.name: Chicken Breast
ingredients.notes: Skin-on or bone-in for extra flavor

ingredients.name: Pickled Ginger and Capsicum
ingredients.notes: Use fresh or frozen, finely chopped

ingredients.name: Oil
ingredients.notes: Any neutral-flavored oil such as canola, vegetable, or peanut oil

ingredients.name: Chili Flakes (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a spicy kick, adjust to taste

ingredients.name: Chinese Five Spice Powder
ingredients.notes: Add extra depth of flavor without overpowering the dish

ingredients.name: Vegetable Stock or Water
ingredients.notes: Use to cook chicken for tenderness and to thin out sauce if needed

instructions: Trim any excess fat from chicken breasts. Pat dry with paper towels.
Season the chicken generously with salt, pepper, and Chinese five spice powder on both sides. Let sit while you prepare other ingredients.
Heat a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add oil and swirl to coat bottom of pan.
Add garlic and chili flakes (if using) to pan for a few seconds until fragrant but not burnt, tossing frequently.
Gently place the seasoned chicken into the pan in a single layer, skin side down. Cook for 3-4 minutes on each side or until golden brown on both sides.
Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside. In the same pan, add pickled ginger and capsicum and stir-fry for about 2 minutes.
Push the vegetables to one side of the pan and return the chicken to the other half of the pan. Pour in vegetable stock or water and bring to a simmer.
Stir until most of the liquid has evaporated, then finish cooking until the sauce thickens slightly but still retains some moisture for a better texture.
Return the cooked chicken back into the pan and toss everything together gently to ensure all ingredients are well combined. Serve hot with steamed rice or noodles.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
